name: LP - Get All Dispositions and Usage

content.query:
SELECT 
dsp.[OperatingCompany]
,[Active]
,dsp.[DispositionCategoryID]
,dct.DispositionCategory
,dsp.[DispositionID]
,[Disposition]
,dsp_vol.LeadCount
,[Comments]
,[Data]
,[SetAppt]
,[Verification]
,[Confirmation]
,[Issue]
,[Presentation]
,[Sale]
,[CountAsKill]
,[OkToReset]
,[LP_Dispositionid]
,dsp.[LP_DispositionCategoryID]
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
join [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION_CATEGORY] dct on 
dsp.DispositionCategoryID = dct.DispositionCategoryID
left join
(SELECT 
[OperatingCompany]
,[DispositionID]
,count([LeadID]) as LeadCount
FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
group by
[OperatingCompany]
,[DispositionID]
) dsp_vol
on 
CONCAT(dsp.[OperatingCompany],'-' ,[Disposition]) = dsp_vol.[DispositionID]
order by 
dsp.[OperatingCompany]
,[Active] desc
,dsp.[DispositionCategoryID]
,dsp_vol.LeadCount desc
,[DispositionID]
